cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Sir. I am calling from Airtel 5G. Your mobile number has won a tower installation lottery.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: What? What lottery? I didn't participate in any lottery. Who is this?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, Sir, this is a lucky draw. You will get monthly rent for installing our tower on your property.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, how much rent? And what's the process?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: The rent will be 50,000 rupees per month. But first, you need to pay a legal documentation and survey fee of 10,000 rupees.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, that sounds too good to be true. I'm not paying any fee. You should be paying me, not the other way around.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, this is a one-time fee. You will get the benefit for lifetime.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I don't think so. This sounds like a scam. I'm going to report this to DBS Bank and get your number blocked.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, please don't hang up. I will give you the account details to pay the fee.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: No, I'm not interested. And I think you're violating some rule by asking me to pay a fee.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: No, Sir, this is a standard procedure.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 117s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: A scammer calls, claiming the user's mobile number has won a "tower installation lottery" where a telecom company ([MOBILE_CARRIER]) will pay them monthly rent for installing a tower on their property. To finalize the "agreement," the user must pay a "legal documentation and survey fee."
